title: Alchemist
description: Alchemist is a mod about.. well Alchemy! It's a total reimaginating of EE for modern audiences and versions of the game
body:
Alchemist is a mod about.. well Alchemy! It's a total reimaginating of EE for modern audiences and versions of the game

To get started, craft some chalk and draw a transmutation circle on the ground.

![Transmutation Circle](https://github.com/Refabricated-Mods/Alchemist/blob/1.20/transmutation_circle.png?raw=true)

Then lure a villager onto it and right click it, that will get you a philosphers stone.
